recommendations.why: it reproduces the saved trace baseline exactly and enforces no-regression additive accounting

recommendations.item: all_candidate_recall as the existing-source additive baseline
recommendations.why: baseline+all_candidate improves union@20 from 60/110 to 66/110 without replacing protected pools
synthetic branches add 4 top-20 rescues and 9 @50/@100 rescues; useful but not enough alone
they can add unique candidates additively, but replacement branch-only recall is weaker; handle in ranking/fusion goal
0 additive top-20 rescues on this focused pack
existing protected+modal+synthetic OR still misses a large tail; several classes need stronger source representation, not just gating

variant_summary.decision: defer for ranking goal; additive can rescue unique turns, but replacement branch-only recall is weaker
defer for ranking goal; not a candidate-recall solution by itself
keep as existing-source additive baseline; it rescues protected misses without replacing saved pools
keep as diagnostic branch family; useful top-20 lift and better @50/@100 tail, but modest enough to gate later
keep/defer class-gated; best single synthetic branch, especially for style-reference/new-artist misses
defer; small lift, era filtering is too blunt as a standalone branch
defer; tiny top-20 lift and broad popularity bias risk
reject for this pack; no additive @20 rescue
